That started probably about two days ago. OK, and the cough, can you describe it a little bit? Is it like a wet cough, a dry cough? How would you describe it? Yeah, I brought up a little bit of sputum. It's been clear, mostly clear and sometimes dry as well. The cough's been getting worse over the last couple of days as well and hasn't really stopped either, it's just kind of ongoing all day. OK, so it's it's pretty constant? Yeah, it's been constant. OK, and how much sputum would you say you're bringing up? I would say, uh, maybe like two teaspoons a day. It's only like a little bit in the tissues and I'm not bringing up sputum every time. OK, and is your sputum at all yellow, green? Or does it have any blood tinge content in it? No, I haven't noticed anything like that. OK, so it's mainly just white or clear. Yeah, it's mostly, yeah, like whiteish or clear. OK, uhm, and have you had anything like this happen before? No, I haven't. OK, and how would you describe the shortness of breath? Are you having trouble taking deep breaths or are you having trouble breathing when exerting yourself, like how would you describe it? Yeah, I have like, a chest tightness. Uh, yeah, that's started within the last two days as well, with the cough. OK, so is it just the tightness when you cough or is it there just throughout? Any family history of any heart or lung conditions? Yeah, my dad had a triple bypass surgery done last last year. He was sixty-three at the time and that's about it. OK, and you don't have any high blood pressure or anything like that, right? No, not that I know of. OK, and do you have any allergies? Uhm, just environmental stuff I think, just, like in the springtime, I'll get itchy eyes or a runny nose. OK, and currently do you work? I do, yeah I work at a car factory nearby, just on the assembly line. And have you been off of work right now, with your symptoms? How is that going? Oh yeah, just like these last two days I called in and I let them know and I left work early yesterday when I realized that I was feeling sick and didn't go in this morning. OK, uh, and what's your living situation like? So I live with my girlfriend, and we have a son who's four years old. OK, and any one of them having any similar symptoms? No, they've been good. My wife works from home and my son, he's been his playful self. OK, that's good. OK, last few questions. Do you smoke at all? No, I don't. Do you use any recreational drugs like marijuana? Uh, no, I don't. OK, and do you drink alcohol? I'll have some wine with dinner, maybe two or three nights a week. OK.
